policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-sub-18 - Resource type restriction'. Only resources types can be deployed that have been whitelisted as resource provider or component by DRCP. For a list of allowed components, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Azure+components .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Generic blocked resource types audit
policyDefinition.description: This policy acts as temporary pre-deny audit to ensure that resource types that have been blacklisted by DRCP cannot be provisioned or altered. In a subsequent DRCP release, this policy gets disabled and the audited resource types are added to existing Deny-policy 'DRCP-Generic-GenericBlockedResourceTypes'.

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
